final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-concept-art
Asset type: cinematic keyframe, wide establishing shot
Primary request: Cyberpunk city street scene illustration: 2077 Neo-Tokyo street nightscape
Scene/backdrop: narrow crowded neon street with dense signage, deep perspective leading to skyscrapers fading into smog, wet pavement with reflective puddles, street food stalls in foreground
Subject: diverse crowd including Japanese women in traditional kimono with cybernetic implants, augmented workers in worn industrial gear, holographic virtual idols performing mid-air, delivery drones weaving through the scene
Style/medium: digital painting illustration, Blade Runner 2049 visual aesthetic, dense detail, cinematic concept art
Composition/framing: extreme deep focus wide shot, street-level perspective, foreground stalls to distant skyscrapers
Lighting/mood: neon-drenched artificial lighting, dramatic high contrast, dreamlike reflections, futuristic yet dystopian atmosphere
Color palette: intense saturated neons - hot pink, cyan blue, orange-yellow dominating, dark shadows, reflective wet surfaces
Materials/textures: wet asphalt with mirror reflections, weathered concrete, glowing holographic projections, metallic cybernetics, traditional silk kimono fabric
Text (verbatim): "日文、中文、英文"
Constraints: maintain deep depth of field from foreground to distant smog-veiled towers, preserve mixed cultural elements, keep neon reflections on wet ground prominent
Avoid: empty sterile streets, cartoonish proportions, oversimplified signage, washed out colors, generic sci-fi without cultural specificity
